title: Opportunity
content:
Behold a hag whom Life denies a kiss
    As he rides questward in knighterrant-wise;
    Only when he hath passed her is it his
    To know, too late, the Fairy in disguise.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Madison Julius Cawein, titled "Opportunity", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
